Timeline: No. The only date is “signed…in August 2016,” which is not an implementation deadline or target year. Binding mechanism: No. It is a “Joint Clean Energy Cooperation Statement” describing “a vision to work together in good faith,” not an ordinance/mandate/requirement. Spatial specificity: Yes. Weak language: Yes, evidenced by “vision to work together in good faith” and “pathways to” (aspirational/process-oriented). Strong language: No; there are no verbs like require/mandate/achieve paired with hard numbers. Under the strict rule, lacking both a quantifiable target and a timeline makes this NON-SOUND.
